allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---where node---"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "---fnm/nvm---"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== winget ==="; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== choco ==="; \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== node via where ==="; where.exe node 2>$null; Write-Output "done")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); npm approve-scripts esbuild 2>&1; Write-Output "---rebuild esbuild---"; npm rebuild esbuild 2>&1)
